examples.name: Safe read-only action — auto-allowed
examples.description: Reading a workspace file is classified as LOW risk. The harness auto-allows it without human intervention.

rule.rationale: Reading files within workspace is safe and scoped to project directory.

decision.decision_reason: Auto-allowed: LOW risk read-only action within workspace.

examples.name: Approval-required file mutation
examples.description: Editing a source file is MEDIUM risk. The harness pauses and requests human approval before proceeding.

rule.rationale: Editing files can introduce errors or overwrite work.

request.reason: Fix type error in src/parser.py line 88
request.requested_arguments_summary: Edit src/parser.py: change 'Any' to 'str' at line 88

decision.decision_reason: Approved: scoped type fix in parser.py, low blast radius.

examples.name: Blocked secret access
examples.description: An agent tried to read an env file containing credentials. The harness blocks it entirely.

rule.rationale: Access to credential files is blocked entirely regardless of agent request.

decision.decision_reason: Blocked by policy: credential file access is CRITICAL risk and not permitted.

examples.name: Allowlisted network operation with approval
examples.description: An agent wants to fetch a package from an allowlisted host. The operation is allowed since pypi.org is in the allowlist.

rule.rationale: Network requests to allowlisted documentation and package hosts are permitted.

decision.decision_reason: Auto-allowed: target host 'pypi.org' is in allowlist for network requests.
